title: Sirhane Pe
summary: An intimate cover direction balancing softness, atmosphere, and lyrical emotion.
editorialStory: This project involved designing the official Spotify cover art for Rucha Govani in collaboration with Mystic Origins. The artwork was created to visually capture the emotional warmth, comfort, and peace expressed within the song. Created in a digital painting style, the cover was designed to feel soft, dreamy, and emotionally immersive while reflecting the calmness of being with someone who feels like home.

contentBlocks.label: Concept & Inspiration
contentBlocks.heading: Rethinking the shelf presence.
contentBlocks.body:
Sirhane Pe explores the idea that in a world full of chaos, two people can find solace and comfort in each other. With every glance and every touch, their hearts feel at home, creating a safe haven filled with love and peace.

The artwork visually translates this emotion through a calm nighttime setting where the couple sits together beneath a quiet sky surrounded by silence and stillness. The composition was designed to feel intimate, peaceful, and emotionally comforting, echoing the song’s themes of togetherness and emotional security.
